title: Adjust date deadline mode symbols?
excerpt: Is there a way to adjust date “deadline mode” symbols and when they appear? The first two symbols default “today” and tomorrow" (see attached from monday.com) but I would like to customize the lead time e.g., 5 days befo…

posts.author: Chels (Chelsea Hodgins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to adjust date “deadline mode” symbols and when they appear? The first two symbols default “today” and tomorrow" (see attached from monday.com) but I would like to customize the lead time e.g., 5 days before deadline. Ideally, I would also like to customize the symbol and colors.

Overall I’m looking for visual ways of conveying an approaching deadline. Thanks!
